questions.prompt: What does a built-in Glean Skill bundle together?
options: Instructions plus the tools to carry them out
questions.explanation: A Skill packages instructions and the tools that act on them, so you invoke a reusable workflow instead of re-prompting it each time.

questions.prompt: In a busy Slack channel, which facet pair pins a message fastest?
options: channel: and a time facet like after:
questions.explanation: Slack indexes messages by channel and timestamp, so channel: plus after:/before: cuts along the axis with the most signal.

questions.prompt: What does `app:jira project:ATLAS priority:high assignee:@raj` return?
options: Raj's high-priority tickets in the Atlas project
All high-priority tickets across every project
Only Atlas tickets in the current sprint
questions.explanation: The facets stack: project: scopes to Atlas, priority:high keeps the urgent items, and assignee: limits to Raj.

questions.prompt: Why does a Confluence `label:` facet help you find the canonical page?
options: Labels are deliberate tags a team applies to mark intent
Labels restrict results to one author
questions.explanation: A team tags the official runbook so it stands apart from drafts that mention the same words — the label is intent placed for exactly that lookup.

questions.prompt: Which Salesforce facets together build a 'large deals closing this quarter' shortlist?
questions.explanation: closedate: bounds the time window and amount:> drops the small deals, leaving the opportunities a pipeline review should cover.
